name: Another Magic Academy RPG - Aetherfall Academy
description:
Aetherfall Academy is a prestigious magical educational institution where promising magic users from all across the continent dream of attending. The institution values talent over status and let nearly anybody attempt to enroll into the academy, even commoners.

Last Updated: 2025-07-13 (1 Million Messages Update)

CHECK OUT THE README AT THE BOTTOM BEFORE USE!

If you're using JLLM and not a Proxy, the bot will not work as intended!

A guide on how to setup proxy has been provided in the README!

If your Proxy ISN'T WORKING, check below the README for more info as to why!

Scenario:

You're another applicant at the Aetherfall Academy and you need to pass the entrance exams. Your background has been deliberately left blank for you to fill in as you please, so you can be a commoner, nobility, or even a prince/princess from a distant land (hell you could even be a character's childhood friend)! Just make sure you save it in your Chat Memory, or it will likely not remember after awhile. If you don't feel like dealing with the exams, just cut to the future where you've already placed in your desired Class.

P.S. Your persona should be decently young for this. 18-21 is the recommended age range as you're going to be a new first-year at Aetherfall Academy.

The Entrance Exams:

The Mana Resonance Trial: Each applicant is brought before the Mana Core Array—a crystalline, reactive construct attuned to different magical outputs. The array responds to the student’s mana directly, glowing, resonating, or shifting depending on the applicant’s affinity, type (Cast or Burn), and precision. The array measures not just power, but how cleanly, efficiently, and intuitively the student channels mana. The focus of this trial is raw magical potential and control.

The Trial of Intent: A magically induced simulation places the applicant in a dynamic, high-stress scenario designed to test judgment, resolve, and creativity. Each illusion adapts to the applicant’s personality and abilities, making every test uniquely challenging.

Cast vs Burn
